blocks.content: Session One. Communication.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Reeves
blocks.content: I want to start with how you two actually talk to each other. Not what you say — how you say it. When things are hard, what does that look like.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I go quiet first. I need to process before I can talk. If I try to talk before I'm ready I say things I don't mean.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: And I read the quiet as distance. So I push.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: And then I feel cornered.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Reeves
blocks.content: Has this caused conflict.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Yes.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Reeves
blocks.content: Walk me through one.
They walked her through October of freshman year.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Reeves
blocks.content: And how did you come back from it.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: He called back. He said he wasn't done. We kept talking until we actually understood each other.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Reeves
blocks.content: Kit, what made you call back.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Because losing the fight mattered less than keeping her.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Reeves
blocks.content: That's repair. You both did something important there without having a word for it. Here's the word: you chose the relationship over being right.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Reeves
blocks.content: What I want you to carry from this session is that both of your instincts — Daisy's need to process and Kit's need to stay connected — are valid. The problem is the timing. You need a signal. Something simple. Something that tells Kit: I'm not gone, I just need time. And tells Daisy: I'm not going anywhere, I'm just scared.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: A signal.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Reeves
blocks.content: Something you both agree on before the next hard conversation happens. Not during. Before.
Kit and Daisy looked at each other through the screen.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: We can figure that out.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Yeah. We can.
